name_cn:
Black Large Monogram Clutch
No.: 2esca490yxl_h27e_tu
Product Info
This A5 clutch is an elegant and minimalist accessory. Crafted from beige and black extra-large Oblique print fabric, it reinterprets the brand's classic pattern with a Dior logo on the front and grained calfskin trim. The zip compartment features a phone slip pocket and four card slots. Can be carried in hand or placed inside a handbag.
Beige and black extra-large Oblique print fabric
Front with metal-plated brass Dior logo
Interior with embossed Dior logo
Metal-plated brass zipper
Internal slip pocket
4 card slots
Size Info
Dimensions: 26.5x17.5 cm (LxH)
Fits A5 and US letter size documents # Fabric
